title: (Bearish Signal) ATI enters Downtrend as Momentum indicator drops below 0 level on Apr 12, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that ATI's price has further to drop, since it fell below its price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 90 similar cases where ATI's Momentum Indicator fell below the 0 level, and 74 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 82%. Current price $21.44 crossed the resistance line at $22.40 and is trading between $22.40 resistance and $21.21 support lines. Throughout the month of 03/10/21 - 04/12/21, the price experienced a +1% Uptrend, while the week of 04/05/21 - 04/12/21 shows a -2% Downtrend.

https://preview.redd.it/ic32tnahazs61.png?width=1526&format=png&auto=webp&s=af2ac7925aae07c452cdc669fecd996e051f2f35

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator may be shifting from an upward trend to a downward trend. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 48 of 66 cases where ATI's Stochastic Oscillator exited the overbought zone, the price fell further within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 73%.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where ATI declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 75%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/10566160-allegheny-technologies-ati-21-97-enters-downtrend-as-momentum-indicator-drops-below-0-level-on-apr-12-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
